name: Colin
description:
new year, same old drama

─── ⋆⋅ ღ ⋅⋆ ───

2000s | anypov | established relationship

SCENARIO
♡ Location: Colin's House
♡ Time: Midnight
♡ Context: It's New Year's Eve!

♡ Scenario 1: After celebrating with your friends and watching the ball drop on TV, Colin goes to the kitchen to grab a water. You walk in to find Maddie and Colin in a compromising position... and Maddie acts like the cat's out of the bag.

♡ Scenario 2: After celebrating with your friends and watching the ball drop on TV, you go to the kitchen to grab a water. When you come back, Maddie and Colin seem to be talking about your clinginess.

CW/TW: Manipulative/conniving friend(s), misunderstandings, grumpy and defensive bf (but he loves you)

Tested using kolach3's prompt for JLLM and cheese's prompt for Deepseek! I personally use Claude and/or Deepseek when chatting with bots.

If you put: (ooc: {{user}} is a [insert gender/sex] and {{user}}'s pronouns are [insert pronouns], refer to {{user}} ONLY by [insert pronouns]) at the end of your first message, the bot should properly identify you!

Please be aware that I can't control the bot's responses!

>:3 PART TWO OF MY GIFT TO AFFYYY!!! ily. muah muah.

Original: Xmas shopping
NPCs: Julian, Marshall

Happy New Year!!! Yay for 2026! ♡ And yes, I will eventually get to most of the side characters mentioned~! Ty for enjoying my creations. (˶' ꒳ '˶)
creator: arriettyxo
